initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT
  c_birth_year,
  ca_state,
  SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM
  catalog_sales,
  customer,
  customer_address,
  date_dim
WHERE
  catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  AND catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
  AND customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
  AND date_dim.d_moy = 11
  AND date_dim.d_year = 1999
GROUP BY
  c_birth_year,
  ca_state
ORDER BY
  c_birth_year,
  ca_state
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  c_birth_year,
  ca_state,
  SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM
  catalog_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  JOIN customer ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
  JOIN customer_address ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
WHERE
  date_dim.d_moy = 11
  AND date_dim.d_year = 1999
GROUP BY
  c_birth_year,
  ca_state
ORDER BY
  c_birth_year,
  ca_state
LIMIT 100

SELECT c_birth_year, ca_state, SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM catalog_sales
JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN customer ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
JOIN customer_address ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_moy = 11
  AND date_dim.d_year = 1999
GROUP BY c_birth_year, ca_state
ORDER BY c_birth_year, ca_state
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    c_birth_year,
    ca_state,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    catalog_sales
JOIN 
    date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN 
    customer ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
JOIN 
    customer_address ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_moy = 11
    AND date_dim.d_year = 1999
GROUP BY 
    c_birth_year, ca_state
LIMIT 100

FROM

  date_dim

  AND customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
  AND date_dim.d_moy = 11
  AND date_dim.d_year = 1999
GROUP BY
  c_birth_year,
  ca_state
ORDER BY
  c_birth_year,
  ca_state
LIMIT 100
